title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six Claude skills for project improvement: web scraping for data discovery, /ingest-source for knowledge base capture, /improve-system for iterative compounding, /ask-the-board for advisor feedback, /internal-focus-group for testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The workflow is demonstrated through building a fitness trainer project and applies across Claude Code, Cowork, and Projects.
